results.definition_en: Having the power or skill to do a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 能夠的、有能力的;具備所需能力。
results.example_en: She is able to run very fast.

results.definition_en: Having a sour taste, like lemon.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 酸的;具有檸檬般之酸味。
results.example_en: This fruit has a sharp, acid taste.

results.definition_en: Having a bad feeling that one wishes to fight or say loud words.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 生氣的、憤怒的;情緒激動而欲爭吵。
results.example_en: She was angry about the broken cup.

results.definition_en: Working by itself, with no person needed.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 自動的;無需人為操作即可運作。
results.example_en: The door is automatic and opens by itself.
results.example_zh_tw: 這扇門是自動的，會自己打開。

results.definition_en: Very good to see; pleasing to the eyes.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 美麗的、漂亮的;悅目可觀的。
results.example_en: The garden is beautiful in spring.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of the night sky with no light.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 黑色的;如無光夜空之色。
results.example_en: She wears a black dress to the meeting.

results.definition_en: So hot that liquid is bubbling and turning into steam.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 沸騰的、滾燙的;液體冒泡並化為蒸氣。
results.example_en: Pour the boiling water into the cup.

results.definition_en: Giving out much light; or clever.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 明亮的、聰明的;發出強光或頭腦靈敏。
results.example_en: The sun is very bright today.

results.definition_en: In pieces; no longer in one whole.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 破的、碎的;不再完整。
results.example_en: The cup is broken on the floor.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of earth or coffee.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 棕色的、咖啡色的;如泥土或咖啡之色。
results.example_en: She has brown eyes and dark hair.
results.example_zh_tw: 她有棕色眼睛和深色頭髮。

results.definition_en: Not costing much money.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 便宜的;價格不高的。
results.example_en: This shop has cheap fruit today.
results.example_zh_tw: 這家店今天水果很便宜。

results.definition_en: Having to do with the parts that things are made of, or with the science of these.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 化學的;與物質組成或化學相關的。
results.example_en: There is a chemical smell from the bottle.

results.definition_en: The most important; first in place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 主要的、首要的;最重要的。
results.example_en: The chief reason for her trip was work.
results.example_zh_tw: 她出差的主要原因是工作。

results.definition_en: Free from dirt or marks.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 乾淨的;沒有髒污或痕跡。
results.example_en: Put on a clean shirt for the meeting.

results.definition_en: Easy to see through or understand.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 清澈的、清楚的;易於看穿或理解。
results.example_en: The water in the lake is very clear.

results.definition_en: Seen often; or shared by many.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 常見的、共通的;頻繁出現或多人共享。
results.example_en: Cats are a common pet in our town.
results.example_zh_tw: 貓是我們鎮上常見的寵物。

results.definition_en: Made of many parts; not simple.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 複雜的;由多部分構成、不單純。
results.example_en: The machine has a complex inside.

results.definition_en: Awake and taking note of what is going on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 有意識的、清醒的;警覺周遭的狀態。
results.example_en: She was still conscious after the fall.

results.definition_en: Having had a sharp blade go through it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 被切的、切開的;經利刃劃過的。
results.example_en: Put the cut bread on the plate.
results.example_zh_tw: 把切好的麵包放到盤子上。

results.definition_en: Going far down; not near the top.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 深的;遠離表面、向下延伸的。
results.example_en: The hole is very deep.

results.definition_en: Needing someone or something else for help.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 依賴的、依靠的;需依靠他人或他物。
results.example_en: The baby is dependent on her mother.

results.definition_en: At the start of a time, before others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 早的;在他人之前、時間開頭的。
results.example_en: She is always early to work.

results.definition_en: Able to be stretched and to go back to its old shape.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 彈性的、可拉伸的;能被拉長後回復原狀。
results.example_en: The band is elastic and goes back to shape.
results.example_zh_tw: 這條繩有彈性，會恢復原狀。

results.definition_en: Working by the power that comes through wires.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 電動的、電力的;以電力運作的。
results.example_en: We have an electric stove at home.

results.definition_en: The same in number, size, or worth.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 相等的、平等的;在數量、大小或價值上相同。
results.example_en: Give equal parts to both children.
